body: "Decision by the Secretary of State on an application by Mallard Pass Solar Farm Limited for the construction, operation and maintenance, and decommissioning of a solar photovoltaic array electricity generating station which includes an onsite substation and associated infrastructure.  Date of decision  12 July 2024  Company / location   Mallard Pass Solar Farm LimitedMayfairLondon   Type of project  Development consent order for a photovoltaic solar farm under the Planning Act 2008.  Maximum output  Up to 350MW.  "
